sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28274" key="drakonti/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δρᾰκοντ-ίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λίθος</foreign>), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n28274.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dragon-stone,</tr_> conferring sharp vision, Ptol.Chenn.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0564.tlg003:p.192" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.192</biblScope> </bibl> W.</sense> </entryFree>
